revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:SfnRef]]: importing template
1 revision imported: importing templates
1 revision imported: importing again with the templates
Adding [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced
